{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200203B21D61D42B42AD6AFA3F"}"},"total":1400},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241935163164754720","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容欢乐 搞笑，是非常好的小说，作者也是煞费苦心了[吃瓜][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686144530,"group_id":"6959051001789680676","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2bXs8/Ik2Yo0wZjLaI8uSbJSNUpMXxQEIvvX9IOjVQk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/31e980af22484ead885db8e6dac5a88b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792877&x-signature=uS6G7yeavmp1RM22NvYxWECy0eQ%3D","user_id":"2981494941819150","user_name":"夜阑观雪♡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2981494941819150","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1739718682,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6959051001789680676","book_info":{"abstract":"【求生，签到，副本，搞笑，爽文】 一觉醒来，人类进入海洋生存游戏，开局一个木筏，材料全靠海里捡。BUG！林峰获得盲盒系统，每天都能抽盲盒！
　　玩家食物匮乏，忍饥挨饿，林峰抽到50条金枪鱼，吃到打饱嗝！
　　玩家遇到鲨鱼，木筏破损，林峰抽到资深渔夫捕鱼叉，宰了鲨鱼吃鱼翅！
　　同一系列盲盒集齐，还能奖励原理图！
　　玩家们还在为生存发愁，林峰已经赚得盆满钵满，驾驶着盲盒开出的超级炮艇，横行末世了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8730b7d980baaef45ed58a38fde16b11","author":"拒绝胡萝卜","author_id":"","book_id":"6959051001789680676","book_name":"海洋求生：每天解锁一个物资盲盒","book_short_name":"荒海求生盲盒","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5862人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6959052609307181582","read_count":"5862","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1527531"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"745","tags":"游戏体育,系统,穿越,末世,求生,搞笑轻松,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f6333a5c1434dc3e2417bb9ed919464a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451324&x-signature=REt6WpHBWzUA%2FF2yB1In1Hf8%2BNo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"58608559085","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.5160132e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200203B21D61D42B42
